mapper.select: SELECT artist_id AS artistId, name AS artistName, profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl FROM artists_tbl ORDER BY artist_id DESC

SELECT al.album_id AS albumId, al.artist_id AS artistId, ar.name AS artistName, al.title AS albumTitle, al.cover_image_url AS coverImageUrl, al.release_date AS releaseDate FROM albums_tbl al JOIN artists_tbl ar ON al.artist_id = ar.artist_id ORDER BY al.album_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO albums_tbl ( artist_id, title, cover_image_url, release_date ) VALUES ( #{artistId}, #{albumTitle}, #{coverImageUrl}, #{releaseDate} )
mapper.select: SELECT genre_id AS genreId, name AS genreName FROM genres_tbl ORDER BY genre_id DESC
